channel.title: mcp Architecture Docs
channel.description: Architecture documentation for the mcp codebase. Explore files, functions, classes, domains, and dependencies.

item.title: GraphCache Class — mcp Architecture
item.description: Architecture documentation for the GraphCache class in graph-cache.ts from the mcp codebase.

item.title: CodeAnalysisTools Domain — mcp Architecture
item.description: A suite of functional components that query the graph to extract structural context like callers, callees, and domains. Architectural overview of the CodeAnalysisTools domain in the mcp codebase. Contains 6 source files.

item.title: GraphCache Domain — mcp Architecture
item.description: A specialized LRU and disk-persistent storage layer for indexed representation of source code structures. Architectural overview of the GraphCache domain in the mcp codebase. Contains 3 source files.

item.title: McpServer Domain — mcp Architecture
item.description: The primary entry point and lifecycle manager for the Model Context Protocol communication and tool registration. Architectural overview of the McpServer domain in the mcp codebase. Contains 5 source files.

item.title: RepositoryUtils Domain — mcp Architecture
item.description: Utility services for interacting with the local file system and preparing data for remote analysis. Architectural overview of the RepositoryUtils domain in the mcp codebase. Contains 4 source files.

item.title: ArchitecturalSummarizer — mcp Architecture
item.description: Aggregates domain-level information to provide high-level project overviews Architecture documentation for the ArchitecturalSummarizer subdomain (part of CodeAnalysisTools domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: ArchiveService — mcp Architecture
item.description: Handles temporary file compression with security-minded exclusions Architecture documentation for the ArchiveService subdomain (part of RepositoryUtils domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: ErrorClassifier — mcp Architecture
item.description: Translates HTTP and network failures into domain-specific error types Architecture documentation for the ErrorClassifier subdomain (part of RepositoryUtils domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: GitProvider — mcp Architecture
item.description: Extracts metadata like commit hashes and remotes from the local environment Architecture documentation for the GitProvider subdomain (part of RepositoryUtils domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: Indexer — mcp Architecture
item.description: Transforms raw API responses into searchable Map-based indexes Architecture documentation for the Indexer subdomain (part of GraphCache domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: InstructionManager — mcp Architecture
item.description: Injects dynamic architectural context into the LLM system prompt Architecture documentation for the InstructionManager subdomain (part of McpServer domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: LruManager — mcp Architecture
item.description: Enforces memory bounds by evicting stale or large graphs Architecture documentation for the LruManager subdomain (part of GraphCache domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: Persistence — mcp Architecture
item.description: Handles JSON-based disk storage and retrieval of indexed graphs Architecture documentation for the Persistence subdomain (part of GraphCache domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: SymbolResolver — mcp Architecture
item.description: Locates specific code entities within the indexed graph using name or path Architecture documentation for the SymbolResolver subdomain (part of CodeAnalysisTools domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: ToolRegistry — mcp Architecture
item.description: Maps MCP tool calls to specific domain handlers in the application Architecture documentation for the ToolRegistry subdomain (part of McpServer domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: Transport — mcp Architecture
item.description: Handles Stdio-based communication with the MCP host Architecture documentation for the Transport subdomain (part of McpServer domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.

item.title: TraversalEngine — mcp Architecture
item.description: Executes multi-hop searches across the call and import adjacency lists Architecture documentation for the TraversalEngine subdomain (part of CodeAnalysisTools domain) in the mcp codebase. Contains 0 source files.
